thesis: PRE-MARKET window (~07:30 ET Tuesday 7/21, generated 2026-07-21T05:34:09Z) — the plan for TODAY's cash open, Tuesday 7/21. STRUCTURE FIRST: an extended, tech-led structural bull is DIGESTING near all-time highs, its one structural crack (MSFT) testing an unconfirmed 50-day repair, the leadership index (QQQ) still without a bull-stack, the crowd rotating DEFENSIVE/ENERGY, and vol LOW but FIRM. Persistence counted by distinct COMPLETED daily bars is 7 (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17); 7/17 is the last confirmed bar. This pre-market cache read (bars asOf 2026-07-21T05:34:04Z, 285 series) still carries Monday 7/20's live values UNCHANGED (SPY 742.09 / QQQ 696.06 / MSFT 402.29 / VIX 18.65) and still flags marketClosed=false, so NO settled 7/20 daily bar and NO distinct overnight/pre-market gap delta is reflected in Tier-A this run — the deterministic frame is carried from Monday's live tape, not a fresh gapped open. WHAT THE FRAME SAYS: SPY 742.09 stays bull-stacked (20>50>200) but sits -0.18% just UNDER its rising 50-day (~743.4) and -2.05% off the ATH (~757.6) — back on the line, not a held floor; QQQ 696.06 is still TANGLED and -3.13% BELOW its 50-day (~718.6, mom5 -2.20), the reclaim UNWON; SPMO 144.52 bull-stacked / VGT 113.23 tangled, both soft short-term (mom5 -3.48 / -2.03); the momentum/semis complex stays heavy (SOXX rolled to Lagging, rsMom1m -13.01, 0/12 up-momentum, 1/12 above the 50-day). The DEFENSIVE/ENERGY rotation is CONFIRMED on the fresh RRG (sector read 2026-07-20T20:48:20Z): XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.44>100, accel +2.53 board-best, rsMom 103.02 board-best, +12.89% over its 200-day, rotation into) with real assets leading underneath (real-assets read 13:30Z earlier this session: BNO 67.7 board leader, USO 62.4 / DBC 66.4 / PDBC 66.6 / DBA 65.6 all Uptrend; GLD 11.1 / SLV 0 Downtrend, BTC-USD 44.6 Mixed), XLRE/XLP Leading, while XLF rolled to Peaking (accel -1.30, out) and XLV (accel -2.34, worst) / XLI (accel -1.43) weaken. MSFT 402.29 remains +0.30% above its 50-day (~401.1) on a carried live tick (mom5 +2.89), still bear-stacked and -8.01% below its 200-day — no confirmed daily close. TACTICAL, last: Friday's monthly OPEX is RESOLVED — dealer gamma has RESET for the new monthly cycle, so any prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing anything off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed. PLAN for today's 7/21 open: HOLD the bull-stack but do NOT add index beta while SPY is back on its 50-day, QQQ is tangled below its own 50-day and vol is firm; ROTATE toward the confirmed, oil-backed XLE over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, still-heavy semis into any opening strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT as it presses its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail after re-verifying the live path.
